narrative:
Alliance City has 11,423 registered voters, with 62.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.8 percentage points.
